about.title: About Voxellab
about.intro: voxellab is a 3D-printing studio crafting modern, premium pieces. We blend trending global designs with Qatari heritage touches — each piece made locally with care and high-quality materials.
about.story_p1: We blend modern design with touches of our heritage, crafting every piece locally with care. In the heart of Doha, we turn trending global designs into premium pieces with a Qatari touch.
about.story_p2: Every piece is printed and finished with care inside Qatar — from idea to finished product — using high-quality materials.
about.story_quote: Made in Qatar 🇶🇦 — crafted, not manufactured.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to answer your questions and help you choose the perfect piece.
